title: Peltsic League
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Peltsic League''' was a military organization and the inter-[[Star system/Legends|system]] rival of the [[Belnar Sector Force]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

The Peltsic League was eventually defeated by the Belnar Sector Force at some point before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], mainly due to Sector Force master tactician [[Tarlo Ganar]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
